notes: Revenue in USD millions unless noted (SPOT in EUR millions)
Fiscal year offsets: SMCI, PCTY, BAH, AFRM, ZS, MDB, BRZE, S, RAMP, VRNT, NCNO, CACI, PL, PTON have FY offsets
Data sourced from SEC filings, earnings reports, and analyst coverage. Values marked 'est.' are estimates.
Price history: monthly end-of-month close prices

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies
PLTR.description: AI-powered data analytics platform for government and commercial enterprises. AIP (Artificial Intelligence Platform) drives rapid enterprise adoption via boot camps.

RKLB.name: Rocket Lab USA
RKLB.description: #2 small satellite launch provider globally. Electron rocket, Neutron in development, Space Systems satellite manufacturing. $1.85B backlog.

APP.name: AppLovin Corporation
APP.description: AI-powered mobile advertising and app monetization platform. AXON 2.0 engine drives industry-leading ad ROI. Expanding into e-commerce advertising.

VRT.name: Vertiv Holdings
VRT.description: Critical digital infrastructure provider specializing in power, cooling, and IT infrastructure for AI data centers. Leading supplier for NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 systems.

AXON.name: Axon Enterprise
AXON.description: Dominant platform for law enforcement: TASER devices, body cameras, cloud software, and AI. SaaS ARR $1.35B+ with 125% NRR.

CRWV.name: CoreWeave
CRWV.description: Pure-play AI cloud infrastructure company. Operates specialized GPU clusters for AI/ML workloads. IPO'd March 2025. $66.8B revenue backlog.

SPOT.name: Spotify Technology
SPOT.description: World's largest audio streaming platform with 751M+ MAUs. Revenue reported in EUR. AI DJ, podcasts, and audiobooks drive ARPU expansion.

DDOG.name: Datadog
DDOG.description: Cloud monitoring and AI observability platform. LLM Observability module growing 3x+ YoY. 32,700+ customers, 120% NRR, $3.46B RPO.

KTOS.name: Kratos Defense & Security
KTOS.description: Affordable, high-performance defense systems: drones, jet target drones, space/satellite systems, microwave electronics. Valkyrie XQ-58A program.

RDDT.name: Reddit
RDDT.description: Community-driven social platform. Data licensing to AI companies (Google, OpenAI). ~1.5B MAUs with strong advertising and API revenue growth.
